channel.title: paype.cc — Every way to get paid. Every way to pay out. — paype.cc
channel.description: Open a business account in minutes — wherever your company is based — and unlock every payment rail: ACH, SWIFT, SEPA, cards, crypto. No monthly fees. No nightmare paperwork.

item.title: ACH — Automated Clearing House
item.description: ACH is the US electronic bank-to-bank payment network. Free on paype, settles in 1–2 business days.

item.title: AML — Anti-Money Laundering
item.description: The laws and procedures that prevent criminals from disguising illegal funds. paype runs continuous AML screening.

item.title: BSA — Bank Secrecy Act
item.description: The primary US anti-money laundering law. paype operates under BSA requirements via its FinCEN registration.

item.title: Cryptographic audit trail
item.description: A tamper-evident record of every transaction on your account. Every entry carries a cryptographic signature you can independently verify.

item.title: FinCEN — Financial Crimes Enforcement Network
item.description: A bureau of the US Treasury and the primary regulator of Money Services Businesses in the United States.
